name: claude-code-internals
description: Gives Claude source-level knowledge of its own architecture. 108 lessons covering every internal subsystem — hooks (all 30 event types), permissions (7-phase pipeline, 23 validators), boot sequence, agents, compaction (including marble-origami reversible collapse), MCP, memory, AskUserQuestion tool, and binary-verified new features through v2.1.120 (Claude Cowork's runtime infrastructure: /background + /bg + /stop background sessions forking the current main session into a kind:'fork' subagent, /daemon Ink TUI managing assistant/scheduled/remoteControl service categories, Fleet view = standalone 'claude agents' CLI subcommand mounting an Ink TUI dashboard with per-agent PR state tracking, /autocompact re-introduced with token-count argumentHint, session identity quartet CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_KIND/ID/NAME/LOG with bg|daemon|daemon-worker discriminator, worktree-isolation runtime prompt mutation, PTY recording via --bg-pty-host argv mode, classifier-summary status pipeline pushing notifyMetadataChanged({post_turn_summary}) to Cowork Desktop with heuristic/llm engine selection and three independent kill switches; CLAUDE_CODE_LEAN_PROMPT granular per-section prompt-shaping toggle distinct from CLAUDE_CODE_SIMPLE wholesale swap, CLAUDE_EFFORT skill-frontmatter field with template-substitution token ${CLAUDE_EFFORT} resolving to literal English phrases (low|medium|high|xhigh), CLAUDE_COWORK_MEMORY_GUIDELINES bypass form replacing entire memory pipeline, tengu_memory_write_survey_event Approve/Reject confirmation dialog with Sonnet-4.6 LLM-generated summary, CLAUDE_CODE_VERIFY_PROMPT debugging-workflow discipline injection, tengu_plan_mode_violated observability tripwire, persistent daemon install kill-switched in v2.1.120 with CLAUDE_CODE_DAEMON_COLD_START='transient'|'ask' on-demand-only model, daemon hot-upgrade self-restart, /fork background subagent inheriting full conversation + 'f' keybinding + implicit fork subagent type, CLAUDE_CODE_FORK_SUBAGENT env + tengu_copper_fox GB flag + CLAUDE_BRIDGE_REATTACH_SESSION/SEQ bridge plumbing, /cost and /stats folded into /usage aliases with dual interactive/headless registrations, cache-diagnosis-2026-04-07 prompt cache diagnostics API beta with graceful server-reject, frontmatter shadow validator emitting tengu_frontmatter_shadow telemetry, WIF user-OAuth advisory file-locking, dark-launched /pro-trial-expired, CLAUDE_CODE_RATE_LIMIT_TIER/SUBSCRIPTION_TYPE overrides, OIDC Federation enterprise auth with credentials-file profiles, CLAUDE_CODE_HTTP(S)_PROXY fallbacks with downstream npm/yarn/docker/Java propagation, /model headless mode, server-side Advisor Tool, PushNotification + KAIROS mobile push, Context Hint API server-driven micro-compaction, Fullscreen TUI with /focus /tui and DECSTBM scrolling regions, Proxy Auth Helper, System Prompt GB Override, /fewer-permission-prompts, canary channel, slow first-byte watchdog, async-agent stall watchdog, Remote Workflow Commands /autopilot /bugfix /dashboard /docs /investigate sunset in v2.1.113). Plus v2.1.139–v2.1.159 (Chapter 21, L91–L104): Dynamic Workflows (Workflow tool, 1000-agent cap, journal-resume, workflow-keyword trigger) + coordinator mode, Opus 4.8 launch (new default, low|medium|high|xhigh|max effort ladder, 4.8 defaults high), streaming-tool-execution GA (gate deleted), MessageDisplay hook as the 30th master-array event (correcting the old 27/19 counts), auto-mode promotion to default + repo-spoof guard, Cloud gateway OAuth provider, org-managed skills/plugins sync from Console + CLI-as-skill, host-delegated credential refresh, background binary-takeover self-upgrade + Fleet→agent-view rename, /loop keepalive, plan-interview removal + CLAUDE_MEMORY_STORES team-memory multistore + command churn (/commit + /commit-push-pr removed, /usage-credits, dark /wellbeing), PEWTER_OWL gate over the internal SendUserMessage tool, and ~30 new codename GB-flag triage. Plus Chapter 22 (L105), from Claude.app (Desktop) app.asar 1.9659.4: the Desktop MCP-Apps host bridge (Claude's own postMessage/JSON-RPC dialect, protocolVersion 2025-11-21, injected window.app with a generic sendRequest + ui/request-display-mode/ui/download-file/anthropic:attach-files/sendPrompt callbacks — NOT read-only — but NO tools/call/callServerTool channel anywhere in the asar, and sendPrompt's only data-return path is ui/message which injects into the chat) versus elicitation as a first-class host control-request (subtype 'elicitation' -> onElicitation -> {action,content} returned privately to the server; form+url modes; sibling of host_auth_token_refresh/oauth_token_refresh), establishing that an MCP server collecting a secret in Desktop/Cowork must use elicitation, never an MCP App UI form. Plus Chapter 23 (L106), from Claude.app (Desktop) app.asar 1.11847.5 + the live fcache feature store: the Cowork CLI-plugin credential broker — a plugin.json top-level 'clis' object declares CLI tools, each entry's env{} map declares secrets (envVar, secret:bool) entered ONCE under Customize → Plugins, stored safeStorage-encrypted in cowork-plugin-env (0600) and injected at CLI invocation by resolver VKr with per-CLI network[] merged into the egress allowlist — the third Desktop credential channel after L105's two, but dark-launched behind GrowthBook gate 2307090146 (cli_plugin), off by default: when off the renderer (pJe→GXr) strips clis before the UI sees it AND the runtime chokepoint PKr (ahead of VKr) returns oauth_disabled, so a correctly-authored manifest shows no credential field and injects nothing with no manual workaround until Anthropic flips the gate (read its state by decoding userData/fcache). Plus Chapter 24 (L107), the Cowork SPAWN + stream-json CONTROL-PROTOCOL contract (first-party binary-verified against app.asar 1.12603.1 + in-VM ELF claude-code-vm/2.1.170 + live fcache via a 14-agent verification workflow): the real Desktop Cowork runtime can't be scripted, so the stable seam is the agent's flags + control protocol — CLAUDE_CODE_IS_COWORK=1 activates cowork mode (the --cowork flag is rejected; don't set CLAUDE_CODE_USE_COWORK_PLUGINS, which TSO() flips to cowork_settings.json/cowork_plugins/), spawn flags -p --verbose --input-format stream-json --output-format stream-json --permission-prompt-tool stdio (without stdio routing, AskUserQuestion is silently auto-dismissed), the initialize handshake is the first message, the control_response envelope is doubly nested, AskUserQuestion answers as updatedInput.answers Record<question,label>, MCP is delivered as SDK servers tunneled over control_request{subtype:mcp_message} (the driver IS the MCP server; --mcp-config is dropped only in safe/hermetic-remote mode via ap5(), not by plain cowork-bg), control-protocol subtypes also include mcp_call/register_repo_root/request_user_dialog/stage_file/end_session, permissions are layered (--allowedTools pre-approval; the host-loop tool partition gre/PNt/Ren + BDt/QDt workspace-alias injection; a PreToolUse PATH-GATING hook on Read/Write/Edit/Glob/Grep that denies /sessions/ VM paths host-side; a speculation-engine run_in_background abort for Bash/PowerShell only; session rules via CLAUDE_BG_SESSION_PERMISSION_RULES; --allow-dangerously-skip-permissions is a capability grant, mode stays default), and auth is CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN via env with API-key vars deleted (not blanked). v2.15.0 also corrects Chapter 20's host-loop/VM-loop framing: gate 1143815894 (fn f_()) decides, production decodes to host-loop, so the agent loop runs host-side and only mcp__workspace__bash/web_fetch run in the VM. Plus Chapter 25 (L108), a first-party binary-verified reference catalog (app.asar 1.12603.1 + in-VM ELF claude-code-vm/2.1.170 + live fcache): ~33 Cowork/Desktop env vars (CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_XAA, CLAUDE_CODE_ENVIRONMENT_KIND byoc/anthropic_cloud/bridge, CLAUDE_CODE_WORKER_EPOCH, CLAUDE_BG_{CLAIM,SOCKET_TOKENS_PATH,RV,PTY}_AUTH, CLAUDE_AGENT_SDK_*, ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_FABLE_MODEL quartet, CLAUDE_CODE_DONT_INHERIT_ENV, CLAUDE_AI_URL/EXTRA_HEADERS_TOKEN/UPDATER_TOKEN, etc.); the production GrowthBook gates decoded from the live fcache (host-loop 1143815894 ON, Fable-model 3045399524 ON, bridge-SDK-adapter 583857784 ON, cowork-runtime-config 1978029737 ON, task-dispatch-limiter 1648655587 ON perTask:1/global:3, sparkplug 2340532315 ON, /rc-alias 2392971184 ON, coworkKappa 123929380 OFF, cli_plugin 2307090146 OFF); and the extended control-protocol surface (request subtypes get_session_cost/get_binary_version/generate_session_title/ultrareview_launch/side_question, system messages elicitation_complete/files_persisted/local_command_output/api_metrics/thinking, and the Bv1 blocking + Uv1 async-park dispatcher sets).
